topStories.description: Each montage typically runs for about two minutes, though some have been longer, according to the report.

topStories.title: Silver prices surge by 6 per cent after 10 days of slump. Check rates here
topStories.description: Analysts attributed the rebound of Silver prices to strong positive sentiment in global precious metals markets and a weaker US dollar.

topStories.title: ‘Shameful, insensitive’: Supreme Court raps Haryana Police over probe into 3-year-old's rape in Gurgaon, SIT formed
topStories.description: The top court issued show cause notices to officials of Gurugram Police and asked them why action should not be taken against them for shoddy investigation in the case

dailyNews.title: 'Refuse To Be Part Of Escalation': Qatar Seeks To Disassociate From US-Iran War
dailyNews.description: Qatar's UN envoy condemned Iranian attacks on "neutral nations". Tehran, however, has accused the Gulf countries of providing the US with military bases to launch strikes.

dailyNews.title: US fuel exports to Cuba’s private businesses rise even as Government faces oil blockade: Report
dailyNews.description: The fuel imports come with strict conditions. Commercial resale is not allowed, and the fuel must be used only by the importing companies.

dailyNews.title: Will end war if conditions met, won't let Trump dictate: Iran rejects US proposal
dailyNews.description: Will end war if conditions met wont let Trump dictate Iran rejects US proposal

dailyNews.title: Wall Street Rises Over 1%: Three Reasons Why US Stock Market Is Rallying Today
dailyNews.description: Global benchmark, brent crude slumped 5% to trade at $95.25 a barrel, while West Texas Intermediate declined 4.87% to $87.88 per barrel.

dailyNews.title: Trump keeps Iran guessing: Why is US proposing ceasefire, deploying troops in Middle East at the same time?
dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump is keeping Iran guessing on what he wants with his moves sending mixed signals. Report have emerged claiming that the Washington has sent peace propodal to Iran. At the same time, other reports suggest Pentagon is planning to send troops in the Middle East.

dailyNews.title: Iran Denies Any Talks With US, Calls Diplomacy A 'Betrayal' Amid Ongoing Conflict
dailyNews.description: Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesperson Esmail Baqaei said there has been no contact between Tehran and Washington since the conflict escalated in late February.

dailyNews.title: Former Minister T. Jeevan Reddy quits Congress ending his 42-year-old association, slams Chief Minister Revanth Reddy

dailyNews.description: S&P 500 opened 0.95% or over 62 points higher at 6,618.70.

dailyNews.title: ‘US lost initiative weeks ago’: Former MI6 chief Alex Younger says Iran now holds upper hand in West Asia war
dailyNews.description: Former MI6 chief Alex Younger asserts Iran has gained the upper hand in its conflict with the US, aided by strategic decisions and a perceived civilizational war. The potential for US-Iran negotiations exists, with Pakistan offering to mediate talks.

dailyNews.title: Quote of the Day: Thomas Edison on hard work — ‘Genius is one percent inspiration and ninety-nine percent perspiration’
dailyNews.description: Thomas Edison’s timeless insight cuts through the myth of instant brilliance, reminding us that sustained effort—not just ideas—drives real success.

dailyNews.title: Brazil's Bolsonaro gets temporary house arrest for ill-health
dailyNews.description: Former President Jair Bolsonaro was moved from his cell to hospital earlier this month with pneumonia.

dailyNews.title: Quadruple amputee athlete accused of killing co-passenger during car ride in US
dailyNews.description: A 27-year-old American para-athlete, who overcame a life-threatening childhood illness to become a professional competitor, has been charged with murder after allegedly shooting a fellow passenger during a car ride.

dailyNews.title: Illinois Gov. Priztker admits 'real failures' as slain Chicago student's hometown pays tribute in lights
dailyNews.description: Illinois Gov. JB Pritzker admits 'real failures' in immigration after Sheridan Gorman's alleged murder by an illegal immigrant released under Biden.

dailyNews.title: Bipartisan Senate bill to cap insulin for Americans at $35 has new momentum
dailyNews.description: Senators are pushing the bipartisan INSULIN Act of 2026, which would cap insulin costs at $35 a month for insured and uninsured Americans starting 2027.

dailyNews.title: LA model and influencer charged with using dating apps to burglarize homes of elderly, wealthy victims
dailyNews.description: LA model Adva Lavie, also known as Mia Ventura, allegedly used dating apps to burglarize elderly victims, now facing six felony counts including burglary.

dailyNews.title: Vanessa, Kai Trump take in Tiger Woods' return to golf at TGL finals
dailyNews.description: Tiger Woods returned to competitive golf at the TGL Finals, joined by Vanessa Trump and her daughter, but his Jupiter Links team fell to Los Angeles Golf Club in a 9-2 loss.

dailyNews.title: Miami Beach mayor says crackdown on spring break chaos has tourism booming once again
dailyNews.description: Miami Beach Mayor Steven Meiner says the city has rebranded from a chaotic spring break hotspot into a wellness and high-end tourism destination.

dailyNews.title: Khanna urges King Charles to meet Epstein victims during Capitol visit
dailyNews.description: Rep. Ro Khanna, D-Calif., tells Fox News he wants King Charles to meet with Epstein victims and others when he comes to Capitol Hill next month to deliver a speech before a Joint Meeting of Congress.

dailyNews.title: New York Times columnist tells liberal readers Trump's war with Iran is 'going better than you think'
dailyNews.description: New York Times columnist Bret Stephens praised President Donald Trump's successes in his war against Iran, telling the paper's liberal readers it's "going better than you think."

dailyNews.title: Texas coach gives fiery, expletive-laden halftime speech before Longhorns' upset over Gonzaga
dailyNews.description: Head coach Sean Miller's expletive-laden halftime speech helped spark Texas' 74-68 upset of Gonzaga, earning the Longhorns their first Sweet 16 appearance since 2023.

topStories.title: Trump, Who Calls Mail-in Voting ‘Cheating,’ Just Voted by Mail
topStories.description: President Trump has long fixated on mail-in voting to bolster his baseless claims of widespread voter fraud. But he recently used the method in a Florida special election.

dailyNews.title: Iran's military ridicules Trump's claims that negotiations are underway
dailyNews.description: President Trump told reporters Tuesday that negotiations with Iran were underway, but an Iranian military spokesperson publicly ridiculed Mr. Trump's claims on Wednesday. CBS News' Aaron Navarro and Chris Livesay have more.

dailyNews.title: Oil trades surged before Trump's Iran post. Some experts are suspicious.
dailyNews.description: Trading in crude oil futures spiked only minutes before President Trump postponed an ultimatum on Iran, causing oil prices to drop and stocks to surge.

dailyNews.title: Trump will not attend CPAC Republican gathering
dailyNews.description: President Trump's public schedule currently doesn't include the 2026 Conservative Political Action Conference. CBS News' Fin Gómez has more.

dailyNews.title: Behind Trump's claims that Iran is ready to make a deal to end war
dailyNews.description: President Trump continues to claim that Iran is ready to negotiate an end to the war. Meanwhile, American forces are still being deployed to the region. CBS News' Ed O'Keefe and Ramy Inocencio report.

dailyNews.title: Iran won't accept U.S. effort at ceasefire in war, state media reports
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump has claimed the United States and Iran are "in negotiations now." But the Islamic Republic denies any direct talks to end the war.

dailyNews.title: Former SEC chair Jay Clayton says regulators would scrutinize trading ahead of Trump post
dailyNews.description: "Any move like that in advance of any announcement, the regulators are going to look at," said Clayton, former SEC chair.

dailyNews.title: Pentagon has no plan to stop Trump sons profiting from defense contracts: Warren, Blumenthal
dailyNews.description: Democrats have been hotly critical of the Trump family's business dealings while President Donald Trump serves in the White House.

dailyNews.title: Iran live updates: Iran insists no negotiations as US sends peace plan
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, with massive joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

dailyNews.title: WATCH:  President Trump says he's 'pretty much not happy' with any deal to reopen DHS
dailyNews.description: As Senate Republicans on Tuesday scrambled to strike a deal to fund DHS amid the agency's partial shutdown, Trump said he would not be happy with any deal they hammered out.

dailyNews.title: Additional Troops Deployed to Middle East as Trump Claims Victory
dailyNews.description: More than 1,000 additional troops from the 82nd Airborne Division are heading to the Middle East, according to two sources. The announcement came as President Donald Trump in the Oval Office Tuesday said, “We’ve won this, this war has been won.” NBC's Richard Engel reports for TODAY on the war in Iran.

dailyNews.title: Justice Department steps up probe into Trump target John Brennan
dailyNews.description: The Justice Department has requested House Intelligence Committee records related to former CIA Director John Brennan, a frequent target of President Donald Trump, according to two sources familiar with the request

dailyNews.title: White House holds press briefing
dailyNews.description: Watch live coverage as White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt holds a press briefing.
